objectives.name: LCT 3.6x
objectives.notes: Thorlabs TL4X-SAP with LifeCanvas dipping cap and correction optics.

processing.notes: New folder structure in cell detection creating a proposals folder and visualization of proposals

data_processes.name: Image destriping
data_processes.notes: Destriping for channel Ex_639_Em_667 in zarr format

data_processes.name: Image flat-field correction
data_processes.notes: The flats were computed from the data             with basicpy, these were applied with the destriping algorithm             and with the current dark from the microscope.

data_processes.name: Image destriping
data_processes.notes: Destriping for channel Ex_561_Em_593 in zarr format

data_processes.name: Image flat-field correction
data_processes.notes: The flats were computed from the data             with basicpy, these were applied with the destriping algorithm             and with the current dark from the microscope.

data_processes.name: Image atlas alignment
data_processes.notes: Template based registration: LS -> template -> Allen CCFv3 Atlas

data_processes.name: Image atlas alignment
data_processes.notes: Template based reversed registration: annotations in template space -> LS

data_processes.name: Image atlas alignment
data_processes.notes: Template based registration using transforms: Ex_561_Em_593

data_processes.name: File format conversion
data_processes.notes: Converting registered image for channel Ex_561_Em_593 to OMEZarr

data_processes.name: Image importing
data_processes.notes: Importing fused data for cell segmentation

data_processes.name: Image cell segmentation
data_processes.notes: Detecting proposals in channel in path: /tmp/nxf.R7UPwogiwk/capsule/data/fused/Ex_561_Em_593.zarr/0

data_processes.name: Image cell quantification
data_processes.notes: The output folder contains the precomputed format to visualize and count cells per CCF region
